children.heading: .—Publications of the Administrator
children.label: a .—Publications of the Administrator
children.text: The Administrator shall publish lists and indexes of registered designs and cancellations of designs and may also publish the drawings or other pictorial representations of registered designs for sale or other distribution.

children.heading: .—File of Representatives of Registered Designs
children.label: b .—File of Representatives of Registered Designs
children.text: The Administrator shall establish and maintain a file of the drawings or other pictorial representations of registered designs. The file shall be available for use by the public under such conditions as the Administrator may prescribe.
